nasb.text: But a Samaritan, who was on a journey, came upon him; and when he saw him, he felt compassion,

esv.text: But a Samaritan, as he journeyed, came to where he was, and when he saw him, he had compassion.

cnv.text: 只有一個撒瑪利亞人，旅行來到他那裡，看見了，就動了憐憫的心，

ccb.text: “后来，有位撒玛利亚人经过，看见这个人，就动了慈心，

csbs.text: 可是，有一个撒马利亚人行路来到他那里，看见他，就动了怜悯之心，
